data.content: Implemented the requested Setlist polish in the worktree only. Removed the redundant overview copy, changed the selected plan card to show scheduled-beat count from the actual chart rows, softened the selected card outline, tightened the beat id strip padding, and added a shipped-knot completion cue in the chart cells. Verified with the focused setlist chart test, full unit suite, lint, typecheck, and production build.
